author: Eusebius of Caesarea

classification.cautionReason: No major mainstream heresy warning is attached by the preview classifier.

lineage: Cyprian, and the Bishops with him, first taught that it was necessary to purify by Baptism those converted from Heresy.

ccel.title: NPNF2-01. Eusebius Pamphilius: Church History, Life of Constantine, Oration in Praise of Constantine

source.title: NPNF2-01. Eusebius Pamphilius: Church History, Life of Constantine, Oration in Praise of Constantine

title: Cyprian, and the Bishops with him, first taught that it was necessary to purify by Baptism those converted from Heresy.

source.title: NPNF2-01. Eusebius Pamphilius: Church History, Life of Constantine, Oration in Praise of Constantine

verses.text: First of all, Cyprian, pastor of the parish of Carthage, maintained that they should not be received except they had been purified from their error by baptism.
But Stephen considering it unnecessary to add any innovation contrary to the tradition which had been held from the beginning, was very indignant at this.
